response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, geospatial projects, and distributed systems, his primary expertise lies in languages like JavaScript/TypeScript, Dlang, and Node.js, with limited direct experience in modern C++ or Rust required for this role. His geospatial work (GISCollective) is promising but lacks evidence of optimizing routing data pipelines or handling high-scale, low-latency systems typical of navigation systems.
strengths: Strong background in geospatial data processing (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Experience with distributed systems and microservices (Dunnhumby, Optilyz)
Demonstrated ability to build scalable, event-driven platforms
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust for routing/data pipeline development
No explicit mention of navigation systems or routing tiling in past roles
Most recent C++ experience appears limited to a brief tenure at National Instruments (2014-2015)
